items.title: Apple is using AI to fix Safari’s extension problem
items.description: Apple is trying to solve one of Safari's biggest weaknesses with AI. Safari has long lacked the robust library of extensions that its rivals have, mainly due to the stringent development requirements from Apple. But now, Apple is inviting users to essentially vibe-code their own extensions. In a dem...

items.title: Amazon employees ask Seattle to put the brakes on new data centers
items.description: On Tuesday, the Seattle City Council will vote on whether to enact a one-year moratorium on new data centers - just two months after several companies proposed building five large-scale centers in the city.
